applicationGuide.zh: 请查看学校官网了解详情。

desc.en: South Korea's #1 university. Highly competitive admission. English-taught courses available.
desc.zh: 韩国第一名校，录取竞争极其激烈，提供英语授课课程。

climate.zh: 首尔四季分明。夏季炎热潮湿（25-33°C），冬季寒冷干燥（-6至3°C）。春秋短暂但宜人。
climate.en: Seoul has four distinct seasons. Summers hot and humid (25-33°C), winters cold and dry (-6 to 3°C). Short but pleasant spring/autumn.

housing.zh: 校内宿舍约₩40-60万/月（约$300-450），优先国际生。冠岳山校区宿舍环境优美。
housing.en: On-campus dorms ₩400,000-600,000/month (~$300-450), priority for international students. Gwanak campus dorms in scenic area.

employment.zh: 韩国顶尖学府，毕业生就业率极高。三星、LG、现代等大企业大量招聘。D-10求职签证可延长至2年。
employment.en: Korea's top university with very high employment rate. Samsung, LG, Hyundai actively recruit. D-10 job-seeking visa extendable to 2 years.

healthcare.zh: 韩国国民健康保险，留学生强制参保。月缴约₩7万（约$50），覆盖大部分医疗费用。
healthcare.en: Korea's National Health Insurance mandatory for international students. ~₩70,000/month (~$50), covers most medical costs.

application.zh: 通过学校官网申请。需高中成绩单、TOPIK或英语成绩、推荐信、个人陈述。部分专业需面试。
application.en: Apply via university website. Transcripts, TOPIK or English scores, recommendations, personal statement required. Some programs require interview.

safetyDetail.zh: 首尔治安良好，公共交通安全便捷。校园有24小时安保和紧急报警系统。
safetyDetail.en: Seoul has good public safety with safe, convenient public transit. Campus has 24h security and emergency alert system.

deadline.zh: 春季入学：9-10月；秋季入学：3-5月
deadline.en: Spring admission: Sep-Oct; Fall admission: Mar-May

applicationGuide.zh: 请查看学校官网了解详情。

desc.en: Korea's MIT. Full scholarship for international students. All courses in English at undergrad.
desc.zh: 韩国的MIT，国际生全额奖学金，本科全英文授课。

climate.zh: 大田市四季分明。夏季炎热（25-33°C），冬季寒冷（-5至3°C）。比首尔稍温和。
climate.en: Daejeon has four seasons. Hot summers (25-33°C), cold winters (-5 to 3°C). Slightly milder than Seoul.

housing.zh: 校内宿舍充足，约₩20-35万/月（约$150-260）。国际生优先分配。校园生活便利。
housing.en: Ample on-campus housing ₩200,000-350,000/month (~$150-260). Priority for international students. Convenient campus life.

employment.zh: 韩国顶尖理工大学。三星、SK、LG等大量招聘。全额奖学金+生活费资助常见。
employment.en: Korea's top tech university. Samsung, SK, LG actively recruit. Full scholarships + living stipends common.

healthcare.zh: 韩国国民健康保险强制参保，约₩7万/月。校内有保健中心。
healthcare.en: Korea's NHI mandatory, ~₩70,000/month. Campus health center available.

application.zh: 通过学校官网申请。需高中成绩、SAT/IB/AP、英语证明、推荐信。无需韩语。
application.en: Apply via website. Transcripts, SAT/IB/AP, English proficiency, recommendations required. Korean not required.

safetyDetail.zh: 大田是安全的科技城市。KAIST校园封闭管理，安保严格。
safetyDetail.en: Daejeon is a safe tech city. KAIST campus is gated with strict security.

deadline.zh: 春季入学：9月；秋季入学：3月
deadline.en: Spring admission: September; Fall admission: March

applicationGuide.zh: 请查看学校官网了解详情。

desc.en: One of Korea's top 3 (SKY). Underwood International College offers full English programs.
desc.zh: 韩国SKY三校之一，Underwood国际学院提供全英文项目。

climate.zh: 首尔四季分明，同SNU。夏热冬冷，春秋短暂宜人。
climate.en: Seoul four seasons, same as SNU. Hot summers, cold winters, pleasant spring/autumn.

housing.zh: 校内国际宿舍约₩40-60万/月。新村校区位于首尔市中心，交通便利。
housing.en: International dorms ₩400,000-600,000/month. Sinchon campus in central Seoul with convenient transport.

employment.zh: 韩国SKY名校之一，毕业生广受韩企和外企认可。延世大学商学院尤为知名。
employment.en: One of Korea's prestigious SKY universities. Graduates highly regarded by Korean and foreign companies. Business school especially renowned.

healthcare.zh: 韩国国民健康保险强制参保。延世大学附属医院是顶级教学医院。
healthcare.en: Korea's NHI mandatory. Yonsei's affiliated Severance Hospital is a top teaching hospital.

application.zh: 通过学校官网申请UIC（英语授课）。需高中成绩、SAT/IB、英语证明、推荐信。
application.en: Apply for UIC (English-taught) via website. Transcripts, SAT/IB, English proficiency, recommendations required.

safetyDetail.zh: 新村/弘大区域是首尔最活跃的学生区，治安良好。校园有24小时安保。
safetyDetail.en: Sinchon/Hongdae area is Seoul's most vibrant student district with good safety. 24h campus security.

deadline.zh: UIC：3月（秋季入学）/ 9月（春季入学）

applicationGuide.zh: 请查看学校官网了解详情。

desc.en: One of Korea's top 3 (SKY). Strong in business, law, and engineering.
desc.zh: 韩国SKY三校之一，商科、法学和工程实力强。

climate.en: Seoul four seasons, same as SNU/Yonsei.

housing.zh: 安岩校区宿舍约₩40-55万/月。首尔市中心位置交通便利。
housing.en: Anam campus dorms ₩400,000-550,000/month. Central Seoul location with convenient transport.

employment.zh: 韩国SKY名校之一。法学、商学、新闻尤为突出。毕业生广受认可。
employment.en: One of Korea's SKY universities. Law, business, journalism especially strong. Graduates highly regarded.

healthcare.zh: 韩国NHI强制参保。高丽大学附属安山医院等提供优质医疗。
healthcare.en: Korea's NHI mandatory. Korea University Ansan Hospital provides quality healthcare.

application.zh: 通过学校官网申请国际学生项目。需成绩单、SAT/IB、英语/韩语证明。
application.en: Apply for international programs via website. Transcripts, SAT/IB, English/Korean proficiency required.

safetyDetail.zh: 安岩/城北区域安全，学生聚集区生活方便。校园24小时安保。
safetyDetail.en: Anam/Seongbuk area is safe with convenient student amenities. 24h campus security.

applicationGuide.zh: 请查看学校官网了解详情。

desc.en: South Korea's Caltech. Tiny, elite science university. Full scholarship for international students.
desc.zh: 韩国的加州理工，精英科技大学，国际生全额奖学金。

climate.zh: 浦项市海洋性气候。夏季温暖（23-30°C），冬季较冷（-2至5°C）。比首尔温和。
climate.en: Pohang has a maritime climate. Warm summers (23-30°C), cool winters (-2 to 5°C). Milder than Seoul.

housing.zh: 校内宿舍充足且必住，约₩15-25万/月（约$110-190）。校园生活完善。
housing.en: Ample mandatory on-campus housing ₩150,000-250,000/month (~$110-190). Complete campus living facilities.

employment.zh: 韩国顶尖理工大学。POSCO钢铁集团创办，毕业生在科技和工程领域极受认可。全额奖学金常见。
employment.en: Korea's top tech university founded by POSCO. Graduates highly valued in tech/engineering. Full scholarships common.

healthcare.zh: 韩国NHI强制参保。校内有保健中心和心理咨询服务。
healthcare.en: Korea's NHI mandatory. Campus health center and counseling services available.

application.zh: 通过学校官网申请。需高中成绩、SAT/IB/AP、英语证明、推荐信。全英文授课。
application.en: Apply via website. Transcripts, SAT/IB/AP, English proficiency, recommendations required. All English-taught.

safetyDetail.zh: 浦项是安全的中型城市。POSTECH校园封闭管理，环境优美安全。
safetyDetail.en: Pohang is a safe mid-sized city. POSTECH campus is gated with beautiful, secure environment.

applicationGuide.zh: 请查看学校官网了解详情。

desc.en: Korea's oldest university (1398), backed by Samsung. Strong in business and engineering.
desc.zh: 韩国最古老的大学（1398年），三星赞助，商科和工程强。

climate.en: Seoul/Suwon four seasons, same as SNU.

housing.zh: 两个校区都有宿舍，约₩35-55万/月。

employment.zh: 三星集团深度合作大学。半导体、IT行业就业极佳。
employment.en: Deep partnership with Samsung Group. Excellent employment in semiconductor and IT industries.

healthcare.zh: 韩国NHI。成均馆大学三星医院是亚洲顶级医院。
healthcare.en: Korea's NHI. SKKU Samsung Hospital is a top Asian hospital.

application.zh: 通过学校官网申请。需成绩单、SAT/IB、英语/韩语证明。
application.en: Apply via website. Transcripts, SAT/IB, English/Korean proficiency required.

safetyDetail.zh: 首尔明伦校区和水原校区均安全。
safetyDetail.en: Both Seoul Myeongnyun and Suwon campuses are safe.

applicationGuide.zh: 请查看学校官网了解详情。

desc.en: Top engineering university. Known for practical education and industry connections.
desc.zh: 顶尖工科大学，以实践教育和产业联系闻名。

climate.en: Seoul four seasons, same as SNU.

housing.zh: 校内宿舍约₩35-50万/月。首尔校区位于城东。
housing.en: On-campus dorms ~₩350,000-500,000/month. Seoul campus in eastern city.

employment.zh: 工科著名，与现代、起亚等企业合作紧密。工程毕业生就业率极高。
employment.en: Famous for engineering with close ties to Hyundai, Kia. Engineering graduates have very high employment rate.

healthcare.zh: 韩国NHI。汉阳大学医院提供优质医疗。
healthcare.en: Korea's NHI. Hanyang University Hospital provides quality care.

application.zh: 通过学校官网申请。需成绩单、英语/韩语证明。
application.en: Apply via website. Transcripts, English/Korean proficiency required.

safetyDetail.zh: 首尔城东区域安全便利。
safetyDetail.en: Eastern Seoul area is safe and convenient.

applicationGuide.zh: 请查看学校官网了解详情。

desc.en: A Jesuit university known for small class sizes and strong humanities/business programs.
desc.zh: 耶稣会大学，以小班教学和人文/商科项目闻名。

climate.en: Seoul four seasons, same as SNU.

housing.zh: 校内宿舍约₩35-50万/月。新村/弘大区域学生生活丰富。
housing.en: On-campus dorms ~₩350,000-500,000/month. Sinchon/Hongdae area rich in student life.

employment.zh: 韩国著名商科和人文大学。商学院和经济学在韩国顶尖。小班教学注重质量。
employment.en: Renowned Korean business and humanities university. Business and economics top-tier in Korea. Small class sizes focused on quality.

healthcare.zh: 韩国NHI。新村地区医疗资源丰富。
healthcare.en: Korea's NHI. Sinchon area rich in medical resources.

application.zh: 通过学校官网申请。需成绩单、英语证明。
application.en: Apply via website. Transcripts, English proficiency required.

safetyDetail.zh: 新村是首尔最安全的学生区之一。
safetyDetail.en: Sinchon is one of Seoul's safest student areas.
